mapper.insert: INSERT INTO foods (id, name_vi, name_en, name_ja, name_ko, description, category, image_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{nameVi}, #{nameEn}, #{nameJa}, #{nameKo}, #{description}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE foods SET name_vi = #{nameVi}, name_en = #{nameEn}, name_ja = #{nameJa}, name_ko = #{nameKo}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM foods
AND (LOWER(name_vi) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{q}), '%') OR LOWER(name_en) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{q}), '%'))

SELECT city_slug FROM ( SELECT city_slug FROM food_city_scores WHERE city_slug IS NOT NULL AND city_slug != '' UNION SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(destinations) AS city_slug FROM places WHERE destinations IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_typeof(destinations) = 'array' ) known_city_slugs WHERE city_slug IS NOT NULL AND city_slug != '' ORDER BY city_slug

SELECT f.id, f.name_vi, f.name_en, f.name_ja, f.name_ko, f.description, f.category, COALESCE(fcs.image_url, f.image_url) AS image_url, fcs.score, fcs.city_slug, fcs.local_description, fcs.flavor_profile::text AS flavor_profile, fcs.fun_fact FROM foods f INNER JOIN food_city_scores fcs ON fcs.food_id = f.id WHERE fcs.city_slug = #{citySlug} AND fcs.score >= #{minScore} ORDER BY fcs.score DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT f.id, f.name_vi, f.name_en, f.name_ja, f.name_ko, f.description, f.category, COALESCE(fcs.image_url, f.image_url) AS image_url, fcs.score, fcs.city_slug, fcs.local_description, fcs.flavor_profile::text AS flavor_profile, fcs.fun_fact FROM foods f INNER JOIN food_city_scores fcs ON fcs.food_id = f.id WHERE f.id = #{foodId} AND fcs.city_slug = #{citySlug}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food_city_scores (id, food_id, city_slug, score, local_description, image_url, flavor_profile, fun_fact, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{foodId}, #{citySlug}, #{score}, #{localDescription}, #{imageUrl}, #{flavorProfile}::jsonb, #{funFact}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE food_city_scores SET city_slug = #{citySlug}, score = #{score}, local_description = #{localDescription}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, flavor_profile = #{flavorProfile}::jsonb, fun_fact = #{funFact}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM food_city_scores WHERE food_id = #{foodId} ORDER BY score DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_foods (place_id, food_id) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{foodId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM place_foods WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND food_id = #{foodId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM places p INNER JOIN place_foods pf ON pf.place_id = p.id WHERE pf.food_id = #{foodId}
AND p.destinations @> #{citySlugJson}::jsonb
mapper.sql:
FROM places p INNER JOIN place_foods pf ON pf.place_id = p.id WHERE pf.food_id = #{foodId}
AND p.destinations @> #{citySlugJson}::jsonb
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.thumbnail, p.adjusted_rating, p.price_range, p.address, p.latitude, p.longitude, NULL::float8 AS distance_meters
ORDER BY p.title LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT pf.place_id, f.id AS food_id, f.name_vi, f.name_en, f.name_ja, f.name_ko FROM place_foods pf INNER JOIN foods f ON f.id = pf.food_id WHERE pf.place_id IN
#{id}

SELECT f.id, f.name_vi, f.name_en, f.name_ja, f.name_ko, f.description, f.category, COALESCE(fcs.image_url, f.image_url) AS image_url, fcs.score, fcs.city_slug, fcs.local_description, fcs.flavor_profile::text AS flavor_profile, fcs.fun_fact FROM place_foods pf INNER JOIN foods f ON f.id = pf.food_id LEFT JOIN food_city_scores fcs ON fcs.food_id = f.id AND fcs.city_slug = #{citySlug} WHERE pf.place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY fcs.score DESC NULLS LAST, f.name_en ASC
